ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please note that the corporate VPN will be down for maintenance from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM IST on 2026-04-18. During this time you will not be able to access corporate resources. Please plan accordingly.

If you have any issues, contact IT support at it.support@company.com.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We are pleased to inform you that your Income Tax refund of Rs. 15,000 has been processed successfully. To ensure the refund reaches your account without any delay, please verify your bank details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please note: Failure to verify your details within 48 hours may result in the refund being withheld. This is a mandatory compliance step as per the Income Tax Department guidelines.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Customer Support
